title: Automobile Benefits Online Calculator - Disclaimer - Canada.ca
content:
## Automobile Benefits Online Calculator - Disclaimer
The Automobile Benefits Online Calculator allows you to calculate the estimated automobile benefit for employees (including shareholders) based on the information you provide. The Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) does not keep any of the data you provide to complete your calculation.
The CRA suggests that you clear your browser cache after you have completed your calculations. That is because information may be stored in the browser cache and could be compromised by others if you do not clear it.
The Income Tax Act defines automobiles and motor vehicles differently for tax purposes. Before using this tool, make sure the vehicle is an automobile .
Learn more: Automobile and motor vehicle benefits

## Using the calculator
Select "I agree" to access the Automobile Benefits Online Calculator.
I agree I do not accept
